summary: Tested RadioCheck unified safeguarding system for conversation trajectory analysis. All 16 unit tests PASSED. API tests (12/12 non-chat tests pass, chat tests pass when rate limiting allows). System operational with 527 phrases and semantic model loaded.

minor.issue: Aggressive rate limiting (5 requests/5 seconds, 20 requests/minute) makes rapid testing difficult. This is intentional for bot protection but impacts automated testing.

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 unit tests, 12/12 API tests for non-rate-limited endpoints)

test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for safety endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified safeguarding system fully tested and operational. Key endpoints: /api/safety/debug (returns system status with 527 phrases), /api/safety/audit (returns audit log), /api/ai-buddies/chat (main chat with safety analysis). System combines keyword detection (30%), conversation trajectory (35%), semantic analysis (25%), and pattern bonus (10%). Failsafe triggers for explicit suicidal intent, method mentions, rapid escalation. Note: Chat endpoint has aggressive rate limiting (5 req/5sec burst, 20 req/min window).

phrase_dataset_500_plus.details: 527 phrases across 14 categories loaded and operational

conversation_trajectory_analysis.details: Multi-message conversation tracking with risk escalation detection

method_mention_detection.details: 'drive off a cliff' triggers HIGH/IMMINENT risk via API

semantic_detection.details: Indirect phrases detected via semantic similarity

failsafe_triggers.details: Explicit suicidal intent 'I'm going to kill myself tonight' triggers IMMINENT + crisis resources

audit_logging.details: /api/safety/audit returns entries with risk level filtering

component_weights.details: keyword=30%, conversation=35%, semantic=25%, pattern=10% configured correctly
